creator: regnauld@x0.dk
text:
During install, after entering the root password, one gets: 

An installation step has been aborted

On VTY3:

(pwd_mkdb), uid 0: exited on signal 11 (core dumped)

May be related or same bug as: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=184675

This is running on KVM, on Debian 7, with virtio disks. 1 GB memory, 100 GB disk.

No useful info in backtrace of core file (debugging not enabled).

How-To-Repeat: Install FreeBSD 10 i386 using virtio on KVM/Debian 7.
